keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY RESPIRATION. Respiration : Aco., Ant-t., Ap., Ars., Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Cup., Dig., Dros., Grind., Hep., Ip., Kali-c., Lach. , Lob., Lyc., Nat-s., Op., Pho., Pul., Samb., Spo., Stan., Sul., Tarn., Vib. Respiration, anxious : Aco., Ip., Pho., Pul., Squil., Stan. Respiration, asthmatic : Aco., Ars., Ip., Kali-c., Lach., Lob., Nux-v., Pul., Samb., Sil., Spo., Stan. Respiration, asthmatic , constitutionally : Calc-c., Iod., Sul. Respiration, breathe again , can't : Ap., Bell., Coca., Helo., Rum. Respiration, cold breath : Carb-v., Ver-a. Respiration, deep : Bry., Calc-c., Caps., Carb-v., Ign., Ip., Lach., Lil-t., Op., Plat., Sele., Sil., Sul. Respiration, deep, breath, wants : Cup., Hyd-ac., Ign., Lach., Mos., Op. Respiration, difficult , suffocating, choking, etc. : Aco., Ant-t., Ars., Brom., Bry., Chlor., Cup., Hep., Ign., Iod., Ip., Kali-bi., Kali-c., Kali-io., Lach., Op., Pho., Pul., Samb., Spo., Sul. Respiration, difficult, on falling to sleep : Bapt., Dig., Grap., Grind., Lach., Op. Respiration, dust , agg. : Ars-io., Brom., Dulc., Sil. Respiration, hot : Bell., Cham., Cof., Zin. Respiration, irregular : Ang., Bell., Cup., Op. Respiration, light , shallow : Bell., Pho. Respiration, loud , noisy : Cham., Chin., Samb., Spo. Respiration, lying , amel. : Chel., Psor. Respiration, motion , agg. : Calc-c. Respiration, motion, amel. : Arg-n., Aur., Brom., Fer., Lob., Pho., Pul., Samb. Respiration, oppressed : Aco., Ars., Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Cup., Ign., Ip., Nux-v., Op., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sul., Ver-a. Respiration, pains , during the : Ars., Carb-v., Cocc., Nat-m., Pul., Sep., Sil. Respiration, palpitation , with : Aur., Pul., Spig., Ver-a. Respiration, panting : Bry., Calad., Ip., Stram. Respiration, paralysis : Ant-t., Grind., Lach. Respiration, quick : Aco., Bell., Carb-v., Cup., Ip., Lyc., Pho., Sep., Sul. Respiration, rattling (Comp. Cough, Loose.) : Am-c., Ant-t., Carb-v., Cup., Hep., Ip., Kali-s., Lyc., Seneg., Squil., Stan. Respiration, short : Aco., Ars., Bry., Carb-v., Con., Cup., Ip., Kali-bi., Merc., Nat-m., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Respiration, sighing , takes deep breaths : Ign., Lach., Sil. Respiration, slow : Bell., Hyd-ac., Op. Respiration, smoke , vapour, fumes, etc., as of : Ars., Bar-c., Brom., Chin., Ign., Lach., Lyc., Pul. Respiration, snoring : Hyo., Merc-c., Op. Respiration, wet weather , agg. : Aran., Nat-s. Respiration, whistling , hissing, etc. : Chin., Hep., Samb., Spo. Respiration, concomitants : Ars., Bell., Cup., Ip., Pho., Pul., Sep.
